steps.title: Square the unit conversion
steps.content:
Because this is an area conversion, square the linear conversion factor:
$$(1.852)^2=3.429904$$

steps.title: Convert the area
steps.content:
Multiply the given area by the square-unit conversion factor:
$$52.00(3.429904)=178.355008$$

steps.title: Round to the nearest tenth
steps.content: The value $178.355008$ rounds to the nearest tenth. The answer is 178.4.
